root_cause: Kubelet restart loop is causing node readiness flapping
evidence: Kubelet startup or re-registration signals observed 4 times within 15 minutes
Node readiness sequence flapped as: start -> ready -> notready -> start -> ready -> notready

causes.message: Timeline contains 4 kubelet startup or re-registration signals
Kubelet repeatedly restarted and destabilized node readiness
Node alternated between Ready and NotReady as kubelet restarted
Workload is affected because the node agent is repeatedly restarting

node:node1: Kubelet startup and node readiness events repeatedly alternated
pod:api-serverless-pod: Pod is assigned to a node with repeated kubelet restart signals
